claim: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) document not just what technical decisions are made, but why and how to enforce them; agents can read ADRs at commit time
actionable: Create ADRs in markdown that explain architecture decisions, their rationale, and enforcement mechanisms; link to them in git hooks and CI/CD
source_title: BDD, ADR, PRD, WTF: Capturing Decisions for Humans and AI Alike

claim: Module-level import linting can prevent entire categories of bugs (like N+1 queries) by structurally blocking problematic patterns at the architecture level
actionable: Use linting rules to forbid database access from rendering templates; prevent agent and human code from violating architecture constraints
source_title: BDD, ADR, PRD, WTF: Capturing Decisions for Humans and AI Alike

claim: Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) with Cucumber enables human-readable executable specs that close the gap between specification and tests
actionable: Write BDD scenarios in Gherkin/Cucumber format; link them to PRDs and critical user journeys; agents can read and execute them
source_title: BDD, ADR, PRD, WTF: Capturing Decisions for Humans and AI Alike

claim: Design systems should enforce consistency rules (like 'only one primary button visible per page') that agents respect alongside visual guidelines
actionable: Document design system rules as code constraints and design specs; agents reference both when generating UIs
source_title: BDD, ADR, PRD, WTF: Capturing Decisions for Humans and AI Alike

claim: Closing the agent feedback loop via git hooks and CI enforcement ensures agents iterate toward valid solutions instead of propagating architectural violations
actionable: Configure git hooks to lint agent-generated code; reject commits that violate ADRs; link feedback to documentation so agents improve
source_title: BDD, ADR, PRD, WTF: Capturing Decisions for Humans and AI Alike

claim: Agents need context compaction strategies; important decisions survive token limits if agents requery documentation rather than keeping everything in context
actionable: Structure documentation so agents can query it by topic; expect 20-50 context compactions in long agent sessions
source_title: BDD, ADR, PRD, WTF: Capturing Decisions for Humans and AI Alike
